heading: Sunday
text: Partly cloudy in the morning, becoming mostly sunny. Highs from near 70 north, into the upper 70s as you head south, 80s in the warmest valleys. Winds becoming northwest near 10 mph, breeziest in northern Champlain Valley

heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly clear, with some passing clouds. Lows through the 40s, nearing 50 in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Monday
text: Sun, mixing with clouds. Warm. Highs from the mid 70s to near 80 in the northeast, from the upper 70s to mid 80s south and west.
